race.comment: Quality throughout in the All-Star Mile - even after a couple of key scratchings. We're siding with TOM KITTEN (1) who comes here fresh off a dynamic first up win at Caulfield. He had to really knuckle down and charge home to beat a well-ridden Feroce, the late splits saying he's come back as well as ever. He won this last year and can sit off a fast or slow speed which is key. PRIDE OF JENNI (8) is, as usual, the unknown. She beat Treasure in the G2 Feehan first up in the Spring, it all depends on how far they let her get in front. As a rising 9yo, can she keep returning and doing what she does? ANTINO (3) can do much better second up in a faster race and STEFI MAGNETICA (9) has a nice shot through the same race behind a superstar fresh. She warmed up nicely and she was a Doncaster winner this time last year.
